query: ok I just realized I keep redoing this exact 'find the latest supabase migration version, bump it by one, write the new file' dance every time I change a schema. Can we capture this as a skill so next time you reach for it automatically?
this whole conversion-from-postgres-types-to-zod-schemas thing — third time we've done it this month. Save it as a skill
I want a skill for 'review my Next.js route handlers and flag the ones that aren't doing zod parsing'. We've done that pattern enough times now.
actually that audit output was great. Let's make this a skill — 'audit Supabase RLS policies from two sessions, owner + non-owner, report which tables are leaking'. Add it to my bucket.
what skills do I currently have loaded in this session?
I need to skill up on React Server Components — recommend a learning path with code examples
save the conversation from today as a session log in docs/sessions/ for me to pick up tomorrow
